prestazioni: Engine: 4.0L flat-six (9A2 Evo) with a bespoke Manthey Racing-developed 102mm throttle body kit, increasing airflow by 12% for a targeted 550+ hp at 8,500 RPM (stock: 510 hp) while retaining the 9,000 RPM redline via reinforced titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems) and upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons with a 12.5:1 compression ratio.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a PWR intercooler (50% larger core volume) to maintain intake temps below 45°C at 1.5 bar boost, supported by a custom Akrapovič 3.5-inch titanium turbo-back exhaust with a straight-pipe design and 4-2-1 merge collectors.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 MkII 4-way adjustable dampers with custom valving for the 992 GT3 Cup’s double-wishbone front and multi-link rear, paired with Tillet B12 carbon fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) and a full roll cage (Schroth 6-point harnesses) integrated with a 992-specific Motec C187 dash logger for real-time G-force and damper position telemetry.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Manthey Racing GT3 Cup-spec front splitter with adjustable dive planes (30% more downforce at 200 km/h) and a custom 992 GT3 Cup rear wing with a 1,800mm carbon fiber blade (3D-printed airfoil profile) for a 40% increase in rear downforce, paired with a full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (992-specific fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) in raw carbon fiber with a matte clear coat.

Lightweighting: Full carbon fiber roof (Weissach package, 8.5 kg savings) replaced with a 992 GT3 RS-spec carbon fiber unit (4.2 kg) from Porsche Motorsport, paired with BBS FI21 forged magnesium wheels (18x12 front, 18x13 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (30/68-18 front, 31/71-18 rear) and a custom titanium bolt kit (ARP) for all critical fasteners.

Exterior Details: Custom livery by Design Forum International (DFI) featuring a matte Graphite Grey base with neon Pink and Electric Blue accents (Porsche’s ‘917 Tribute’ scheme), paired with a full PPF (XPEL Ultimate) and ceramic coating (Gyeon Ceramic Quartz) for track durability, with a custom LED light bar (Oracle Lighting) integrated into the front bumper for night racing.
